name: Symptoms showed up weeks after work accident - too late?

mainEntity.name: Symptoms showed up weeks after work accident - too late?

acceptedAnswer.description: No, if medically linked to incident; delayed injuries compensable.[4] Context: Causation via expert testimony required.[4] Key factors: Continuous treatment; no intervening cause. Practical guidance: See doctor ASAP on symptoms; get MRI linking back. File amendment if needed. Deadlines from discovery date sometimes.
